side_effects.description: Significant water retention on microdose GH, retaining enough water to interfere with perceived fat loss results. Never seems to stabilize even after on and off use for a month.

protocol_notes: OP is in a caloric deficit. Uses 3g potassium and 5g taurine daily with no effect on water retention. Has tried dandelion root but it dried out skin too much. Not using creatine or glucosamine due to water retention sensitivity. Tried 5g salt in 4L water daily which caused bloating but resolved within a week. Has been using GH on and off for about a month. Considering every-other-day dosing to alternate IGF-1 elevation and water reduction days.
